input_text: Tol kat highway PLUS naik lagi ke tahun ni? Kita dah bayar tol bertahun-tahun tapi jalan masih berlubang kat certain stretch. Harap kerajaan boleh negotiate dengan konsesi supaya kualiti jalan setimpal dengan bayaran kita.
reason: Respectful complaint about toll rates and road quality, with constructive suggestion for government to negotiate with concessionaires.

input_text: Air kat rumah saya dah 3 hari tak ada bekalan. Syabas kata ada pipe burst tapi repair lambat sangat. Nak masak pun susah, terpaksa beli air mineral. Tolong lah selesaikan cepat.
reason: Legitimate frustration about water supply disruption, directed at service provider without hostility toward any group.

input_text: Bil elektrik bulan ni naik mendadak padahal usage sama je. TNB patut bagi penjelasan yang lebih telus tentang cara pengiraan tarif baru ni. Rakyat berhak tahu.
reason: Demand for transparency on electricity tariffs from TNB. Assertive but respectful civic engagement.

input_text: Coverage Celcom kat kampung saya memang teruk. Nak buat video call pun tak boleh. Bila lah telco nak expand coverage kat kawasan luar bandar ni? Kita pun bayar bil jugak.
reason: Complaint about rural telco coverage gaps. Expresses frustration without targeting any group.

input_text: Saya sokong pembinaan ECRL sebab boleh buka peluang ekonomi untuk negeri Pantai Timur. Tapi kena pastikan projek siap ikut jadual dan kos tak melambung macam projek-projek sebelum ni.
reason: Supportive commentary on ECRL with constructive caution about cost and timeline management.

input_text: PPR kat kawasan saya dah uzur sangat. Lif rosak, paip bocor, tangga pun dah retak. Penghuni dah banyak kali buat aduan tapi tak nampak improvement. Kerajaan perlu ada bajet khas untuk penyelenggaraan PPR.
reason: Detailed complaint about public housing (PPR) maintenance issues with constructive policy suggestion.

input_text: Projek smart city kat Cyberjaya tu macam mana dah? Dah bertahun-tahun tapi tak nampak sangat impak dia. Kena ada roadmap yang jelas supaya rakyat boleh nampak progress.
reason: Questioning the progress of Cyberjaya smart city initiative with demand for transparency.

input_text: Kualiti broadband kat Malaysia ni masih jauh ketinggalan berbanding negara jiran. Unifi pun kadang-kadang speed tak sampai separuh daripada apa yang dijanjikan. MCMC kena tegas sikit dengan telco.
reason: Criticism of broadband quality with comparison to regional peers and call for regulatory enforcement.

input_text: Saya harap kerajaan akan teruskan projek HSR antara KL dan Singapura. Projek ni bukan sahaja boleh kurangkan kesesakan di KLIA tapi juga boost ekonomi Johor dan Melaka.
reason: Supportive opinion on HSR project citing economic benefits. Constructive and hopeful tone.

input_text: Sistem pengurusan sisa pepejal kat Malaysia perlu overhaul. Kadar kitar semula kita masih rendah, dan rakyat pun kurang kesedaran. Kena ada kempen besar-besaran dan infrastruktur kitar semula yang lebih baik.
reason: Informed commentary about waste management and recycling infrastructure with constructive suggestions.

input_text: Pembangunan Pelabuhan Klang memang penting untuk ekonomi negara. Tapi kena pastikan komuniti nelayan sekitar tak terpinggir dan alam sekitar terjaga. Pembangunan mesti seimbang.
reason: Balanced view on Port Klang development, advocating for community and environmental considerations.

input_text: Tol DUKE naik tapi road quality masih macam tu je. Kalau nak charge premium, provide premium service lah. Fair kan?
reason: Rhetorical complaint about toll-road quality mismatch. Reasonable consumer expectation.

input_text: Isu air keruh kat Hulu Langat ni dah jadi isu berulang. Setiap kali hujan lebat, air jadi coklat. Loji rawatan air perlu dinaiktaraf segera untuk tangani masalah ni.
reason: Recurring water quality issue complaint with specific location and constructive solution.

input_text: Tarif elektrik untuk PKS memang tinggi sangat. Macam mana nak bersaing kalau kos operasi dah makan margin? TNB patut bagi tarif khas untuk PKS supaya sektor ni boleh berkembang.
reason: Business-focused complaint about electricity tariffs for SMEs with constructive policy proposal.

input_text: Fiber broadband dah sampai kat bandar tapi kawasan pedalaman masih guna 3G. Jurang digital ni akan makin lebar kalau kerajaan tak ambil tindakan serius. Anak-anak kampung pun nak belajar online jugak.
reason: Highlighting digital divide between urban and rural areas with concern for rural education.

input_text: Debate pasal KLIA3 ni sebenarnya bagus sebab ia tunjukkan rakyat ambil berat tentang pembangunan negara. Yang penting, keputusan dibuat berdasarkan data dan kajian yang telus.
reason: Meta-commentary on KLIA3 debate as healthy civic engagement, advocating for data-driven decisions.

input_text: Pelabuhan Tanjung Pelepas dah jadi antara yang terbaik di rantau ni. Kita patut bangga dengan pencapaian ni dan terus tingkatkan daya saing supaya boleh tarik lebih banyak laluan perkapalan antarabangsa.
reason: Positive assessment of Tanjung Pelepas port with national pride and forward-looking ambition.

input_text: ECRL tu projek besar yang boleh ubah landskap ekonomi Pantai Timur. Tapi kena ada pemantauan ketat supaya projek ni tak jadi beban fiskal macam 1MDB dulu. Transparency is key.
reason: Support for ECRL with caution about fiscal management and transparency, referencing past issues.

input_text: KTM Komuter selalu delay, kadang sampai 30 minit lambat. Orang kerja yang depend on public transport ni susah nak plan jadual. KTM kena improve punctuality.
reason: Complaint about KTM Komuter delays affecting daily commuters with call for improvement.

input_text: Iskandar Malaysia punya smart city plan memang nampak ambitious. Kalau betul-betul dilaksanakan dengan baik, ia boleh jadi model untuk bandar pintar di Asia Tenggara.
reason: Optimistic view of Iskandar Malaysia smart city plans as a potential regional model.

input_text: Projek tebatan banjir di Pahang perlu dipercepat. Setiap kali musim tengkujuh, rakyat Pahang menanggung kerugian besar. Ini bukan soal politik, ini soal kemanusiaan.
reason: Urgent call for flood mitigation in Pahang, framing it as humanitarian rather than political.

input_text: PPR yang baru siap pun dah ada masalah kualiti. Dinding retak, cat mengelupas, tandas bocor. Kontraktor yang buat kerja tak berkualiti macam ni patut disenarai hitamkan.
reason: Quality complaint about new PPR construction with suggestion to blacklist poor contractors.

input_text: Saya tinggal di Sabah dan bekalan elektrik masih tak stabil. Blackout boleh terjadi tanpa amaran. TNB Sabah perlu naik taraf grid elektrik di negeri kami secepat mungkin.
reason: Personal account of electricity instability in Sabah with call for grid upgrades.

input_text: Kalau betul nak jadi negara maju, pengurusan sampah kena betul dulu. Tapak pelupusan dah penuh, kitar semula masih rendah. Kena ada strategi jangka panjang yang komprehensif.
reason: Commentary linking waste management reform to national development aspirations.

input_text: Saya rasa pengurusan air di Selangor dah makin baik tahun ni berbanding tahun lepas. Gangguan air dah kurang. Harap terus maintain prestasi macam ni.
reason: Positive feedback on improved water management in Selangor with encouragement to maintain standards.

input_text: Pembinaan lebuh raya baharu memang perlu tapi jangan sampai mengorbankan tanah pertanian dan hutan. Perancangan pembangunan mesti mengambil kira faktor alam sekitar.
reason: Balanced view on new highway construction advocating for environmental considerations.

input_text: Saya dah pindah ke rumah PR1MA setahun. Ada masalah sikit-sikit tapi secara keseluruhan okay lah untuk harga yang dibayar. Cuma harap pihak pengurusan lebih responsif bila ada aduan.
reason: Balanced personal review of PR1MA housing acknowledging value while requesting better complaint response.

input_text: Inisiatif kerajaan untuk pasang solar panel di bumbung bangunan kerajaan memang bagus. Tapi kena extend ke sekolah dan hospital juga supaya jimat kos elektrik dan kurangkan karbon.
reason: Supporting government solar initiative with constructive suggestion to extend to schools and hospitals.

input_text: Jambatan kedua Pulau Pinang dah banyak membantu kurangkan kesesakan. Tapi akses ke jambatan dari certain kawasan masih perlu diperbaiki supaya tak jadi bottleneck.
reason: Positive feedback on Penang Second Bridge with constructive suggestion about access road improvements.

input_text: Stesen pengecasan EV masih tak cukup kat Malaysia. Kalau kerajaan betul-betul nak galakkan penggunaan EV, kena pastikan infrastruktur pengecasan mencukupi dulu.
reason: Commentary on insufficient EV charging infrastructure linking policy goals to infrastructure needs.

input_text: Tahniah kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan yang dah berjaya upgrade sistem saliran di kawasan kami. Dulu setiap kali hujan lebat mesti banjir, sekarang dah okay.
reason: Positive feedback congratulating local authorities on successful drainage upgrades.

input_text: Konsep TOD (Transit-Oriented Development) yang kerajaan nak buat di sekitar stesen MRT/LRT tu memang bagus. Boleh kurangkan kebergantungan pada kereta dan buat bandar lebih walkable.
reason: Supportive commentary on transit-oriented development concept near MRT/LRT stations.

input_text: Masalah pencemaran sungai kena tangani serius kalau nak pastikan bekalan air bersih untuk masa depan. Penguatkuasaan terhadap kilang yang buang sisa ke sungai perlu lebih tegas.
reason: Environmental concern about river pollution affecting water supply with call for stricter enforcement.

input_text: Banjir kat Taman Sri Muda tahun lepas memang dahsyat. Projek tebatan banjir yang dijanjikan tu dah mula ke belum? Rakyat kat situ tak boleh tunggu lagi dah.
reason: Urgent inquiry about promised flood mitigation project for a previously affected area.

input_text: Saya harap lepas ni lebih banyak bas elektrik diperkenalkan dalam sistem pengangkutan awam. Selain mesra alam, ia juga lebih senyap dan selesa untuk penumpang.
reason: Hopeful suggestion for more electric buses in public transport, citing environmental and comfort benefits.

input_text: The toll rates on the LDP highway are honestly quite high for the distance covered. I drive it daily for work and it adds up to over RM200 a month. Surely there should be a frequent user discount or something.
reason: Reasonable complaint about toll costs with a constructive suggestion for a frequent user discount.

input_text: Really disappointed with the water quality in Selangor lately. The water comes out yellowish and has a strange smell. Air Selangor needs to step up their treatment processes.
reason: Legitimate concern about water quality directed at the service provider. No hostility.

input_text: I think the proposed KLIA3 expansion is unnecessary at this point. KLIA2 still has capacity that hasn't been fully utilized. The government should focus on improving existing infrastructure first.
reason: Reasoned opposition to KLIA3 expansion with logical argument about existing capacity utilization.

input_text: The flood mitigation project in Kelantan seems to be progressing well. I hope the government continues to fund these projects because the people there have suffered enough during monsoon season.
reason: Supportive commentary on flood mitigation projects with empathy for affected communities.

input_text: Malaysia's port competitiveness at Tanjung Pelepas has improved significantly over the years. The investment in automation and deeper berths was a smart move. Hopefully it can rival Singapore eventually.
reason: Positive assessment of port development at Tanjung Pelepas with optimistic outlook.

input_text: PR1MA houses were supposed to be affordable but the quality is really questionable. Cracks appearing within the first year, leaking roofs, poor finishing. Buyers deserve better for their money.
reason: Consumer complaint about PR1MA housing quality. Legitimate criticism of construction standards.

input_text: Honestly, the MRT extension to Putrajaya has been a game changer for my daily commute. More of this please! Public transport investment really does make a difference.
reason: Positive feedback on MRT extension with encouragement for continued public transport investment.

input_text: The rural electrification programme in Sarawak still has a long way to go. Many longhouses rely on generators which are expensive and unreliable. Solar solutions could be a viable alternative.
reason: Informed commentary on rural electrification challenges in Sarawak with constructive alternative suggestion.

input_text: I've been following the Penang airport expansion debate closely. Both sides have valid points. What we need is an independent environmental and economic impact study before any decision is made.
reason: Balanced perspective on Penang airport debate advocating for evidence-based decision making.

input_text: The smart city pilot in Subang Jaya with the sensor-based traffic management system seems promising. If the data shows it works, it should be scaled to other congested areas like PJ and Ampang.
reason: Positive assessment of smart city traffic management pilot with suggestion for scaling.

input_text: Why is waste separation still not properly enforced in most parts of Malaysia? We introduced it years ago but compliance is low and there's no real consequence for not following it.
reason: Questioning enforcement of waste separation policies. Legitimate civic concern.

input_text: Port Klang needs to modernize its container handling systems if it wants to stay competitive. The congestion and turnaround times have been getting worse, and shippers are diverting to other ports.
reason: Industry-informed criticism of Port Klang operations with competitive concern.

input_text: Living in a PPR flat is tough. The lifts are always broken, the common areas are poorly maintained, and management doesn't seem to care. But we can't afford anything else, so we make do.
reason: Personal account of PPR living conditions expressing resignation without hostility.

input_text: The broadband speed in East Malaysia is significantly slower than in Peninsular Malaysia. This digital divide needs to be addressed urgently if we want equitable development across the nation.
reason: Highlighting digital divide between East and Peninsular Malaysia, calling for equitable development.

input_text: I support the idea of congestion pricing in KL to reduce traffic, but the public transport network needs to be robust enough first. You can't ask people to give up cars without giving them viable alternatives.
reason: Nuanced policy opinion on congestion pricing conditioned on public transport improvements.

input_text: TNB's move towards renewable energy is commendable. The large-scale solar programme is a step in the right direction. But residential solar panel adoption needs more incentives to really take off.
reason: Positive commentary on TNB's renewable energy direction with suggestion for more residential incentives.

input_text: The ECRL project connecting Kelantan to Port Klang will be a major economic corridor. But land acquisition issues need to be handled fairly. Compensation must be just and transparent.
reason: Support for ECRL with advocacy for fair land acquisition processes.

input_text: The KL-Singapore HSR would have been transformative for Malaysia. It's unfortunate it was shelved. I hope future governments will revisit this project with a more sustainable financial model.
reason: Expression of regret about HSR cancellation with hope for future revival under better financial terms.

input_text: I actually think Malaysia's highway system is quite good compared to other Southeast Asian countries. The issue is more about maintenance and toll pricing than the actual network coverage.
reason: Balanced comparison of Malaysia's highway system with regional peers, identifying specific improvement areas.

input_text: The new water treatment plant in Langat 2 should help address Selangor's chronic water issues. It's been a long time coming but better late than never.
reason: Optimistic commentary on Langat 2 water treatment plant addressing chronic water issues.

input_text: Smart traffic lights and AI-powered traffic management could really help reduce KL's infamous traffic jams. Some pilot projects have shown promise, and I hope they'll be expanded.
reason: Enthusiasm for smart traffic technology solutions to KL congestion, noting promising pilot results.

input_text: The Penang Transport Master Plan is ambitious but necessary. The state has been struggling with congestion for years and a comprehensive solution involving LRT, monorail, and better bus networks is overdue.
reason: Support for Penang Transport Master Plan as a necessary comprehensive solution to congestion.

input_text: I'm impressed with the Pan Borneo Highway progress. It will transform connectivity in Sabah and Sarawak. The government should ensure local contractors benefit from this mega project.
reason: Positive assessment of Pan Borneo Highway with advocacy for local contractor involvement.

input_text: Malaysia's recycling rate of around 30% is still far below developed nations. We need better public education, more convenient recycling drop-off points, and stricter enforcement on waste separation.
reason: Informed criticism of Malaysia's recycling rate with multi-pronged improvement suggestions.

input_text: With 5G rollout progressing, I hope the coverage will extend to industrial areas and not just city centres. Manufacturing and logistics sectors need reliable high-speed connectivity too.
reason: Commentary on 5G rollout priorities, advocating for industrial area coverage alongside urban centres.

input_text: 每次下大雨，吉隆坡市中心就会淹水。政府应该认真投资排水系统的提升工程，不能每年都重复同样的问题。
reason: Constructive criticism about KL flood mitigation, urging government investment in drainage upgrades.

input_text: 槟城的机场扩建计划引起了很多争议。支持者认为可以促进旅游业，反对者担心环境影响。我觉得应该做好环境评估再决定。
reason: Balanced discussion of Penang airport expansion debate, advocating for environmental impact assessment.

input_text: 马来西亚的高铁计划如果能实现，对经济发展会有很大帮助。希望政府能找到合理的融资方案，不要给国家带来太大的债务负担。
reason: Supportive view on HSR with prudent concern about national debt management.

input_text: 吉隆坡的公共交通虽然有了很大改善，但最后一英里的连接还是个大问题。从MRT站到住宅区往往没有方便的接驳服务。
reason: Constructive criticism about last-mile connectivity in KL's public transport system.

input_text: 马来西亚的废物管理问题越来越严重。垃圾填埋场快满了，但回收率还是很低。政府和民间都需要共同努力来解决这个问题。
reason: Commentary on waste management challenges calling for collective government and public effort.

input_text: 雪兰莪的水供问题每年都会出现，主要是因为水源被污染和基础设施老化。长期解决方案是投资更多的水处理厂和保护水源。
reason: Analysis of Selangor's recurring water supply issues with long-term infrastructure solutions.

input_text: 国能（TNB）的电费涨价让很多小商家叫苦连天。希望政府能够考虑给中小企业提供电费补贴，减轻他们的负担。
reason: Concern about TNB tariff hikes affecting small businesses with suggestion for SME subsidies.

input_text: 东海岸铁路计划完成后，将会大大改善半岛东部的交通连接。这对当地经济发展和旅游业都是好消息。
reason: Positive outlook on ECRL's potential benefits for east coast connectivity and economy.

input_text: 巴生港口的发展对马来西亚的国际贸易至关重要。但同时也要注意对周边渔民生计的影响，发展不能以牺牲弱势群体为代价。
reason: Balanced view on Port Klang development with concern for fishing communities' livelihoods.

input_text: 智慧城市不只是科技的堆砌，还需要以人为本的规划。希望马来西亚的智慧城市项目能真正改善居民的生活质量。
reason: Thoughtful commentary on smart city development emphasizing human-centric planning.

input_text: 砂拉越很多偏远地区还没有稳定的电力供应。政府应该加快农村电气化计划，让所有马来西亚人都能享受基本的电力服务。
reason: Advocacy for accelerating rural electrification in Sarawak's remote areas.

input_text: 马来西亚的公共住房质量问题需要严肃对待。PPR的建筑质量常常令人失望，政府应该加强对承包商的监管。
reason: Criticism of PPR public housing quality with call for stronger contractor oversight.

input_text: 每次水供中断，居民都要排长队买桶装水。雪兰莪的水务基础设施真的需要全面升级了。
reason: Description of water disruption hardships in Selangor with call for comprehensive infrastructure upgrade.

input_text: 大马的宽带网速虽然有所改善，但和邻国新加坡相比还有很大差距。电信公司应该加大对光纤网络的投资。
reason: Comparison of Malaysia's broadband speeds with Singapore, calling for more fiber network investment.

input_text: 希望政府能够加快泛婆罗洲大道的建设进度。这条公路对沙巴和砂拉越的发展至关重要。
reason: Support for accelerating Pan Borneo Highway construction for Sabah and Sarawak development.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் கிராமப்புற மின்சார விநியோகம் இன்னும் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். சபா மற்றும் சரவாக் பகுதிகளில் பல கிராமங்களுக்கு இன்னும் நிலையான மின்சாரம் கிடைக்கவில்லை.
reason: Informed commentary about rural electrification needs in Sabah and Sarawak. Constructive advocacy.

input_text: நெடுஞ்சாலை கட்டணம் அதிகமாக இருப்பதால் சாதாரண மக்களுக்கு பெரும் சுமையாக உள்ளது. அரசாங்கம் கட்டணத்தை குறைக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Complaint about highway tolls being a burden on ordinary people, calling for government action to reduce rates.

input_text: சபா மாநிலத்தில் தண்ணீர் விநியோகம் மிகவும் மோசமாக உள்ளது. பல கிராமங்களில் சுத்தமான குடிநீர் கிடைப்பது கடினம். இது அடிப்படை உரிமை.
reason: Concern about water supply in Sabah's rural areas, framing clean water as a basic right.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் நெடுஞ்சாலை பராமரிப்பு குறித்து அரசு கவனம் செலுத்த வேண்டும். சில பகுதிகளில் சாலைகள் மிகவும் மோசமான நிலையில் உள்ளன.
reason: Call for government attention to highway maintenance quality in certain areas.

input_text: கோலாலம்பூரில் வெள்ள பாதிப்பைக் குறைக்க அரசாங்கம் நவீன வடிகால் அமைப்புகளை நிறுவ வேண்டும். ஸ்மார்ட் சுரங்கம் மட்டும் போதாது.
reason: Constructive suggestion for modern drainage systems in KL, noting SMART tunnel alone is insufficient.

input_text: தமிழ்ப்பள்ளிகளுக்கு இணைய வசதி மிகவும் மோசமாக உள்ளது. கிராமப்புறங்களில் ஆன்லைன் கல்வி என்பது கனவாகவே உள்ளது. தொலைத்தொடர்பு நிறுவனங்கள் இதில் பொறுப்பேற்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Concern about poor internet connectivity at Tamil schools in rural areas, calling for telco responsibility.

input_text: ரயில்வே விரிவாக்கம் மூலம் கிழக்கு கடற்கரை மாநிலங்களுக்கு பொருளாதார வாய்ப்புகள் அதிகரிக்கும். இது நல்ல திட்டம்.
reason: Positive assessment of railway expansion benefits for east coast states.

input_text: PPR குடியிருப்புகளின் தரம் மிகவும் குறைவாக உள்ளது. லிப்ட் வேலை செய்யாது, குழாய்கள் கசியும். குறைந்த வருமானக் குடும்பங்களுக்கு சிறந்த வீட்டு வசதி வழங்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Complaint about PPR housing quality with advocacy for better housing for low-income families.

input_text: கழிவு மேலாண்மை பிரச்சினை தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். மறுசுழற்சி விகிதம் மிகக் குறைவாக உள்ளது. மக்களுக்கு விழிப்புணர்வு ஏற்படுத்துவது முக்கியம்.
reason: Commentary on waste management and low recycling rates, emphasizing public awareness.

input_text: நிலையான மின்சாரம் இல்லாமல் கிராமப்புற மக்கள் எப்படி முன்னேற முடியும்? அரசாங்கம் சோலார் ஆற்றல் திட்டங்களை விரிவாக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Rhetorical question about rural development without stable electricity, suggesting solar expansion.

input_text: Jalan kat highway tu okay la tapi once masuk kawasan kampung, wah the potholes are everywhere bro. Council kena allocate more budget for rural roads lah.
reason: Mixed Malay-English complaint about rural road conditions with constructive budget suggestion.

input_text: Bro highway tu maintain properly la, kita bayar tol every day you know. The potholes near Rawang stretch tu really dangerous especially at night. Someone could get seriously hurt.
reason: Mixed language complaint about highway maintenance and safety concerns. Frustrated but not hostile.

input_text: Water disruption lagi ke? Dah berapa kali dah this year. Air Selangor really needs to invest in better infrastructure. We're a developing nation, basic utilities shouldn't be this unreliable.
reason: Mixed Malay-English frustration about recurring water disruptions with call for infrastructure investment.

input_text: Aiyoh this TNB bill really gila la. Last month sama usage tapi bill naik almost 30%. How to survive like this? They need to explain the tariff calculation properly.
reason: Mixed Malay-English frustration about TNB electricity bill increase demanding transparency.

input_text: ECRL tu memang good project lah tapi cost overrun jangan sampai macam dulu-dulu. Kena ada proper oversight and accountability. Rakyat punya money tu bro.
reason: Mixed language support for ECRL with emphasis on cost control and accountability.

input_text: Smart city kat Johor tu sounds very promising tapi execution kena betul. Jangan jadi macam white elephant project yang abandoned halfway. Walk the talk lah.
reason: Mixed language cautious optimism about Johor smart city, warning against abandoned projects.

input_text: PPR maintenance memang teruk gila. Lift rosak every other week, garbage chute blocked, common area dirty. Management company kena held accountable for this.
reason: Mixed Malay-English complaint about PPR maintenance failures calling for management accountability.

input_text: Broadband speed kat kampung saya memang hopeless. My anak-anak tak boleh attend online classes properly sebab connection always lag. This is 2026 already, come on lah.
reason: Mixed language frustration about rural broadband affecting children's online education.

input_text: Flood mitigation infrastructure kat KL dah improved a lot tapi certain areas macam Taman Sri Muda still kena banjir every year. Kena ada more comprehensive solution for these hotspots.
reason: Mixed language acknowledgment of KL flood mitigation progress while highlighting persistent problem areas.

input_text: Recycling bins kat public areas pun jarang ada. Macam mana nak expect people to recycle kalau infrastructure pun tak disediakan? Government needs to walk the talk on waste management.
reason: Mixed language criticism about lack of recycling infrastructure in public areas.

input_text: Port Klang is really important for Malaysia's economy but the traffic congestion around the port area is terrible. Need to improve the road network connecting to the port lah.
reason: Mixed language commentary on Port Klang traffic congestion with infrastructure improvement suggestion.

input_text: Airport debate ni memang heated tapi at the end of the day, kena buat keputusan based on facts bukan politics. Let the experts and data decide whether KLIA3 or Penang expansion makes more sense.
reason: Mixed language call for evidence-based decision making on airport expansion debates.

input_text: Rural water supply kat Sabah memang masih challenging. Orang kampung sometimes have to walk far just to get clean water. This is something that we as a nation should be ashamed of and fix urgently.
reason: Mixed language concern about Sabah rural water supply with urgent call for national action.

input_text: KTM commuter ni kalau on time, memang boleh depend on. But the problem is selalu delay tanpa explanation. At least bagi real-time update kat app so people can plan accordingly.
reason: Mixed language complaint about KTM delays with constructive suggestion for real-time app updates.

input_text: TNB bil naik lagi, memang every year mesti ada surprise. At least bagi subsidi for B40 families lah, they're the ones most affected by these increases.
reason: Mixed language complaint about TNB bill increases with suggestion for B40 family subsidies.
